title: Illegal Verilog output after 'proc_prune'; assigns 'reg' from a constant

features.name: reg with both always assignment and continuous assign
features.description: Code should include a signal declared as reg that is driven both inside an always block and via a continuous assign statement outside the always block

features.name: process with implicit default case
features.description: Code should include a case statement with an implicit default case (bare 'case' without explicit condition) inside a process
features.snippet:
process $group_1
  assign \a_pc 8'00000000
  switch \sel
    case 1'0
      assign \a_pc [7:2] 6'101010
    case
      assign \a_pc [7:2] 6'111111
  end
  sync init
end
